close_reason: Implemented min_vesting_time optimization per QuiCK Algorithm 2. Added Store.min_vesting_time/3 and Store.update_queue_pointer/4. Manager now updates pointer after dequeuing to prevent rescanning queues with only future-scheduled items.
description:
**QuiCK Paper Reference:** Algorithm 2, lines 6-10:
```
min_vesting_time = read minimum vesting time in QDB
if 0 ≤ min_vesting_time or is_active then
  vesting_delay = MAX(0, min_vesting_time - now)
  requeue(p, vesting_delay)
```

**Current Behavior:**
After processing a queue, no pointer management is done. Scanner will rescan the same queue on next cycle even if remaining items have future vesting times.

**Expected Behavior (per QuiCK):**
After dequeuing, read the minimum vesting_time of remaining items and requeue the pointer with that delay. This prevents rescanning queues that only have future-scheduled items.

**Files to modify:**
- `apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/consumer/manager.ex`
- `apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/store.ex` (add min_vesting_time query)

**Risk:** Low - Optimization to reduce unnecessary scans
title: Add pointer requeue with min_vesting_time optimization
